prompt: A small translucent golden-amber octopus creature with TWO TALL STALKED EYES like snail eye stalks, perched alone in the fork of a massive lichen-covered tree. The creature is pulling a thin pale fiber from the bark with one delicate tentacle, beginning to weave it between two branches. Misty rainforest, soft diffuse light, mood of solitude and determination. The creature glows faintly amber against the blue-green lichen. NOT a snail — it has eight tentacles with suckers.
